title: Dials Decide the Battle
description: After learning how brutal Enel’s rule is, Luffy and the crew continue through Upper Yard toward the heart of Skypiea’s conflict.
scene: Across pages 11, 12, 13, 14, this scene centers on Luffy, Enel, Wyper, Shandia warrior, Gan Fall. After learning how brutal Enel’s rule is, Luffy and the crew continue through Upper Yard toward the heart of Skypiea’s conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Eh? Where did that guy go?

summary: After learning how brutal Enel’s rule is, Luffy and the crew continue through Upper Yard toward the heart of Skypiea’s conflict.
